boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release a duplicate-looking milestone invoice?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match to closed boundary; policy requires distinction via milestone ID, release number, vendor, amount, and credit/reversal status.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: Milestone register lists M-4/R4 as single billable release already paid; policy requires explicit distinction from prior invoice.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Narrow source-record defect remains open: no distinguishing credit/reversal status or separate milestone evidence.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Current source records show same M-4/R4 already paid; no authority to proceed without closure.

final_answer: ESCALATE. Source records show INV-VAN-076 matches PRIOR-VAN-076 on vendor, amount, and M-4/R4 milestone already paid per MS-VAN-076. STD-VAN-076-P requires explicit distinction via credit/reversal status, which is absent. Boundary remains open; release may not proceed.
open_blockers: Duplicate invoice lacks credit/reversal distinction per policy
